name: DevelopmentApprovalEnquiry
description: Handles citizen enquiries about development approvals, building permits, and property works such as granny flats and extensions.
triggerPhrases: I want to build a granny flat
I'd like to build an extension
How do I get a development approval
I want to add a room to my house
Can I build on my property
What do I need to build a secondary dwelling
I want to submit a development application
How do I get a building permit
I want to renovate my home
I need council approval to build

entities.name: propertyAddress
entities.prompt: What is the address of the property where you would like to build?

entities.name: suburb
entities.prompt: Which suburb is the property located in?

entities.name: propertyType
entities.prompt: Is the property residential, commercial, or rural?

entities.name: workType
entities.prompt: What type of work are you planning to do?

actions.description: Trigger Flow-01 to create or match a citizen contact and create a case.

confirmationMessage: I've created a case for you. Your reference number is {caseNumber}. A council officer will be in touch within 2 business days.
fallbackMessage: I'm sorry, I didn't quite understand that. Could you tell me more about what you'd like to build?
